footer.desc: Omega Petrotech connects energy sourcing, trading, logistics, and governance to support reliable, transparent, and sustainable regional operations.

hero.subtitle: A global hub for premium energy products and clean energy, seamlessly connecting world-class suppliers to the high-growth markets of the Asia-Pacific and Indochina regions.

dna.quote: "A modern energy firm is more than just logistics—it is a network built on trust, compliance, and deep financial intelligence."
dna.card1_desc: A robust trade finance facility up to USD 100,000,000 in strategic partnership with Tier-1 international banking institutions like Emirates NBD, ensuring seamless cross-border trade execution.
dna.card2_desc: Uncompromising focus on clean energy under Euro 5 standard products, backed by a rigorous corporate governance framework and strict risk mitigation systems.
dna.card3_desc: An highly flexible and adaptive multi-modal logistics management model that maximizes speed-to-market and distribution efficiency while operating free from heavy fixed-asset burdens.

portfolio.tag: Our Product Portfolio | Premium Energy Solutions
portfolio.title: Premium Energy
portfolio.item1_desc: Premium Euro 5 automotive diesel with ultra-low sulfur, effectively reducing environmental emissions and PM 2.5.
portfolio.item2_desc: Liquefied Natural Gas, a high-efficiency clean fuel powering industrial sectors toward long-term sustainable growth.
portfolio.item3_desc: Innovative renewable energy and alternative power solutions, driving the global transition toward Net Zero Carbon.

roadmap.title: Execution Timeline & Milestones
roadmap.status: Vision 2030: Premier International Energy Trading House
roadmap.p0_bullet1: Direct Sourcing from Global Refineries (Singapore) via long-term contracts.
roadmap.p0_bullet2: High-Seas Title Transfer via Bill of Lading (B/L) Endorsements with 100% paper hedging.
roadmap.p0_bullet3: Immediate Delivery to End Buyers in Australia, Vietnam, and ASEAN (Target: 720,000 MT/year).
roadmap.p0_bullet4: Build Trading Track Record for Corporate Credibility.
roadmap.p1_bullet1: Fulfill Regulatory Criteria for Section 7 Fuel Trader License in Thailand (Ministry of Energy).
roadmap.p1_bullet2: Establish Leased Bonded Storage Tanks (Sriracha, Maptaphut) with asset-light compliance strategy.
roadmap.p1_bullet3: Prepare for Physical Discharge and Domestic Trading operations setup.
roadmap.p2_bullet1: Capture B2B Wholesale Market in Thailand and Lao PDR (Lao state-owned enterprises & dominant importers).
roadmap.p2_bullet2: Expand Transit Trade to Lao PDR utilizing VAT 0% & Excise exemptions via $100M finance facility.
roadmap.p2_bullet3: Direct physical vessel discharge into bonded tanks for strategic distribution with strict KYC/AML screening.
roadmap.p2_bullet4: Supply Section 10 Jobbers and corporate industrial fleets.
roadmap.enabler1_title: USD 100 Million Cash-Backed Trade Finance Facility
roadmap.enabler1_desc: Strategic Partnership with Emirates NBD to support high-volume global transactions.
roadmap.enabler2_desc: Integrated Matched-Hedging mechanisms alongside automated Sanctions Screening protocols.

cta.title: Access the Energy Corridor
cta.subtitle: We invite institutional partners, refiners, and logistics providers to engage with our strategic network as we redefine regional energy flows.

overview.title: Omega Petrotech Co., Ltd.
overview.desc_part1: Established in 2025 as an international trader of oil, natural gas, and renewable energy. It represents a powerful synergy of a highly qualified board of directors and executive team, rich with extensive experience and expertise in the energy industry and national compliance.

finance.label: Revolving Trade Finance Facility
finance.desc: Secured a strategic joint venture partnership with a leading capital group in Dubai, UAE. Driving financial stability through Tier-1 banks such as Emirates NBD and top-tier global financial institutions.

sourcing.title: Sourcing Focus
sourcing.desc: Dedicated to procuring and distributing premium-grade energy products from world-class refineries and leading global suppliers.

vision_mission.title: Vision & Mission
vision_mission.vision_text: To become a premier International Energy Trading House by 2030, seamlessly bridging world-class, Euro 5 standard clean energy supplies to the high-growth markets of the Asia-Pacific and Indochina regions.
vision_mission.m1_desc: Operate and manage global supplies of petroleum, natural gas, and renewable energy to ensure long-term sustainability and seamless continuity.
vision_mission.m2_desc: Establish and elevate energy logistics and transportation networks that guarantee absolute transparency, maximum security, and full compliance with international regulatory standards.
vision_mission.m3_desc: Commit to serving as a highly reliable long-term offtake partner, driving shared value and mutual growth alongside world-class refineries and strategic partners.

jv.subHeading: Formed by three groups of energy sector veterans entering into a joint venture agreement, establishing clear, systematic, and international divisions of roles and responsibilities.

bmi.title: BMI International Co., Ltd.
bmi.description: Comprised of experts with extensive experience as oil procurement agents across the ASEAN region. Its executives also serve on the board of directors of major domestic energy supply and logistics corporations via both land and maritime routes.

jb1.title: J.B One Group FZC
jb1.description: Established in a Free Trade Zone, with its headquarters located at Al Shmookh Business Center, One UAQ, UAQ Free Trade Zone, Umm Al Quwain, United Arab Emirates. Legally registered as an official oil trader.
jb1.footerText: Oil networks across Asia and Middle East.

ept.title: Ekkorn Petroleums Co., Ltd.
ept.description: Comprised of Thai and international business professionals with long-standing global investor networks. Features executives with profound experience in corporate and international law who have managed transnational oil trade operations.
ept.footerText: Manages legal affairs and corporate compliance.

kitisak.name: Kitisak Aramrueng
kitisak.secondaryName: กิติศักดิ์ อร่ามเรือง

bio.paragraph1: Mr. Kitisak Aramrueng is a distinguished business leader and strategic advisor with nearly four decades of experience spanning engineering, massive-scale urban infrastructure development, and high-level government policy. As President of Omega Petrotech, he brings a vision of sustainable growth backed by a proven track record of managing complex, multi-billion baht enterprises.
bio.paragraph2: Prior to joining Omega Petrotech, Mr. Aramrueng served as Chairman of the Board for Krungthep Thanakom, the enterprise arm of the Bangkok Metropolitan Administration. In this crucial role, he steered landmark national projects, including the integration and management of the BTS Green Line mass transit extensions, the development of the Gold Line monorail, and pioneering hazardous waste-to-energy initiatives based on a Zero Waste model. His leadership was instrumental in implementing Bangkok's underground communication cable network and introducing the nation's first electric passenger boat services.
bio.paragraph3: Mr. Aramrueng's expertise lies at the intersection of technological innovation and corporate strategy. His career began in specialized R&D and electrical engineering, evolving into academia as a Master's degree curriculum developer in Telecommunications at Assumption University (ABAC), and later, managing director of IT and communication consulting firms. He has served as a senior Consulting Engineer on vital national projects, including the development of the new Thai Parliament building's automation and ICT systems, and critical command centers for the Royal Thai Police.
bio.paragraph4: Currently, alongside his presidency at Omega Petrotech, Mr. Aramrueng continues to shape development policy as a Senior Advisor to Haier Energy (Thailand) and as an Advisor to the Deputy Chief of the Chonburi Provincial Administrative Organization. He is a key member of the Sub-Committee on Circular Economy Development under the House of Representatives, guiding national industrial policy toward the BCG (Bio-Circular-Green) economy model.
bio.paragraph5: Mr. Aramrueng holds a Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical (Communications) from Rajamangala Institute of Technology. His profound experience in forging Public-Private Partnerships (PPP), driving Smart City strategies, and building sustainable business organizations positions Omega Petrotech for exceptional leadership in the changing energy and energy services landscape.

premium.title: Premium Energy Products
premium.desc: We specialize in the strategic sourcing and distribution of premium-grade energy products, meticulously selected from world-class producers and refineries to ensure maximum reliability and quality. Our portfolio includes:

diesel.name: Ultra-Low Sulfur Diesel (EN590 10PPM)
diesel.desc: Premium Euro 5 automotive diesel with ultra-low sulfur, effectively reducing environmental emissions and PM 2.5.

lng.name: Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG)
lng.desc: A high-efficiency clean fuel powering industrial sectors toward long-term sustainable growth.

renewable.name: Alternative Renewable Energies
renewable.desc: Innovative renewable energy and alternative power solutions, driving the global transition toward Net Zero Carbon.

logistics.title: Supply Chain Network
logistics.desc: We leverage a robust, interconnected global supply chain network designed for maximum efficiency, security, and strategic market penetration.

partners.label: Global Network
partners.title: Strategic Partners
partners.desc: Sourcing directly from world-class refineries and premier global commodity brokers, through 12-Month Term Contracts to guarantee continuous supply security.
partners.note: Cultivating long-term partnerships to guarantee global supply security and operational excellence.

models.label: Operational Models
models.title: Trading & Logistics Framework

offshore.name: Offshore Trading
offshore.desc: Procuring refined petroleum products from international suppliers and executing immediate high-seas title transfers via Bill of Lading (B/L) endorsements directly to end buyers in Australia, Vietnam, and other ASEAN markets, without incurring local storage costs in Thailand in the early stage.

transit.name: Transit Trade to Indochina
transit.desc: Transitioning to strategic customs-free storage zones (Bonded Marine Terminals) in key coastal hubs like Sriracha or Maptaphut to act as cross-border transit trading hubs for truck distribution into the Lao PDR under optimized tax structures.

models.footer: * Integrating oceanic sourcing with seamless cross-border transit networks.

compliance.title: Compliance Excellence & Enhanced CDD
compliance.desc: Omega Petrotech Company Limited operates under a strict, Zero-Tolerance Compliance Architecture that aligns thoroughly with the Wolfsberg Principles and international Anti-Money Laundering (AML) standards.

sanctions.title: Automated Sanctions Screening
sanctions.desc: All counterparts and intermediaries must undergo rigorous automated screening against global watchlists.

list.us: United States Office of Foreign Assets Control (US OFAC)

vessel.title: Vessel Vetting Policy
vessel.desc: All tankers must clear strict procedures under the Ship Inspection Report Programme (SIRE).
vessel.warning: The Company enforces an absolute prohibition against vessels with a history of navigating sanctioned waters or those registered under high-risk Flags of Convenience.

esg.title: ESG Integration & Sustainable Horizons
esg.desc: In alignment with global energy transition mandates, the Company’s long-term business framework strategically integrates decarbonization and sustainable development into its core operations.

immediate.label: Immediate Mandate
immediate.title: Ultra-Low Sulfur Diesel
immediate.desc: 100% of physical diesel trading operations are restricted exclusively to Ultra-Low Sulfur Diesel (Diesel EN590 10PPM).
immediate.note: This strategy actively reduces particulate matter (PM) and sulfur oxide (SOx) emissions along high-traffic logistics corridors across the ASEAN region.

future.label: Phase 2 Horizons
future.title: Future Carbon Offset Initiatives

sub1.title: Biofuel Blending
sub1.desc: Incorporating advanced biofuel blending programs (such as B10/B20) to support cleaner energy alternatives in the supply chain.

sub2.title: Renewable compliance
sub2.desc: Investing in utility-scale renewable energy compliance projects within the Western Economic Corridor (WEC) of Thailand.

future.footer: * Actively supporting the decarbonization objectives of upstream global supply partners.
